meta.title: Guardians of the Future — Platform Proposal

hero.subtitle: A civic action platform that makes real-world community impact honest, visible, and worth proving.

understood.statement: A platform where community groups track and prove their real-world environmental and social impact together - transparently, meaningfully, building a collective case for change from the ground up.

pillars.title: One Data Foundation
pillars.description: Every feature is a query on one shared Impact Record. Clean, auditable, and honest.

pillars.title: Community First
pillars.description: No leaderboards, no competition. Recognition that reflects what was actually done.

pillars.title: Honest Impact
pillars.description: Numbers are estimates with stated methodology. Transparency is the credibility mechanism.

cards.title: Joins
cards.body: Clicks a magic link. Enters name, city, language. No password. Inside in under two minutes.

cards.title: Adopts
cards.body: Her Circle browses the Challenge Library and adopts the Neighbourhood Compost Sprint.
cards.aside: A Circle: a profile, a team, and a shared impact history.

cards.title: Reports
cards.body: 30 days later — 24kg composted. She submits a Level 2 report with photo. Admin approves within 48hrs.
cards.aside: The trade-off between ease and weight is transparent and chosen.

cards.title: Impact
cards.body: The Impact Record gets its first row. 24kg → 12kg CO₂e avoided. Stored at write time. Honest.
cards.aside: One clean data foundation. Every view is a query on this table.

cards.title: Recognised
cards.body: She visits her profile. Finds the First Impact marker waiting. Silently earned. Discovered. Real.
cards.aside: Markers crystallise something that already happened.

investment.title: The Numbers
investment.note: Payment tied to phase delivery · 50% deposit to commence · All amounts excl. VAT

closing.subtitle: Guardians of the Future · Platform Pilot · March 2026
